channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Savannah Guthrie says her family is offering a $1 million reward for her mother’s return
item.description: “Today” show host Savannah Guthrie says her family is now offering a $1 million reward for information leading to the recovery of her mother.

item.title: Northeast US digs out from brutal snowstorm that disrupted flights and canceled school
CIA offers tips to potential informants in Iran as Trump considers military action
